name: scada-honeynet
description: Mimics many of the services from a popular PLC and better helps SCADA researchers understand potential risks of exposed control system devices. Tool: http://www.digitalbond.com/blog/2007/07/24/scada-honeynet-article-in-infragard-publication/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #430 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map scada-honeynet output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved scada-honeynet output file to parse instead of running it live.
